caption: A man with blond hair, glasses, and white over-ear headphones sits in front of a light-colored wooden wall. He wears a dark blue patterned polo shirt and a gold chain. Behind him is a decorated Christmas tree with colorful lights and a framed poster featuring the number "20" and a logo. A black professional microphone is positioned in front of him. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head. His mouth opens and closes as he talks, and he looks slightly to the side and then back toward the center. The lighting and background remain static throughout the clip, while the man's subtle movements convey he is engaged in a conversation or recording a broadcast.
